name: Variable Staleness on Fall-Through
description: Variable modified inside an if-block but used after it. On the fall-through path (condition false), the code uses the unmodified value.
smt2Template:
(declare-const condition_true Int)
(declare-const {{var}}_before Int)
(declare-const {{var}}_after Int)
(assert (=> (= condition_true 0) (= {{var}}_after {{var}}_before)))
(assert (= condition_true 0))
(assert (= {{var}}_after {{var}}_before))
(check-sat)

teachingExample.explanation: discount applied in if-block but total calculated after — fall-through uses undiscounted total
teachingExample.smt2:
(declare-const has_coupon Int)
(declare-const discount Int)
(declare-const total Int)
(assert (=> (= has_coupon 0) (= discount 0)))
(assert (= has_coupon 0))
(assert (= discount 0))
(check-sat)
